category: Using The Vendor Neutral Contingency And Ras Auxiliary File
description: Use this API to run AC contingency calculation function with RAS model. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.2.0. ierr = accc_ras_2(accfile,xmlfile,option)

parameters.name: accfile
parameters.description: Is the name of the contingency solution output file. (input).

parameters.name: xmlfile
parameters.description: Is the name of the apply tracing output file. (input).

option.description: Do not create Apply Tracing file.
If Apply Tracing file fails to open, write output to current progress device.

error_codes.description: invalid tolerance value from RAS file.
invalid solution option value from RAS file.
buses in island(s) without a swing bus; use activity TREE.
too many islands in base case.
no AC Contingency Solution Output File specified.
in-service induction machines are in the “stalled” or “tripped” state.
buses with bus type code and series element status inconsistencies.
Contingency and Remedial Actions definitions not in memory.
Contingency and Remedial Actions definitions have not been validated.
error opening Contingency Solution Output File.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
